message:
fix(ui): z-index stacking audit, stat block SWR, points unification (#6481, #6485, #6486-#6498) (#6516)

* fix(ui): z-index stacking audit for sidebars, dropdowns, tooltips, snackbars

Escalate sidebar, mission sidebar, and mobile overflow menus to z-modal so
they sit above their z-overlay backdrops (touches no longer get trapped).
Promote navbar feature-hint tooltips and Layout connection snackbars to
z-toast so they remain visible above modals and banners. Promote the agent
picker dropdown to z-[250] so it escapes the sticky navbar header stacking
context. Belt-and-suspenders: add 'hidden md:block' to the sidebar resize
handle to guarantee it cannot punch through mobile drawers.

Fixes #6486
Fixes #6488
Fixes #6489
Fixes #6490
Fixes #6492
Fixes #6493
Fixes #6494
Fixes #6496
Fixes #6498

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(cluster-admin): stale-while-revalidate Nodes/Warnings stat blocks (#6485)

On dashboard refresh, the Nodes and Warnings stat blocks flickered 0 →
final value because the underlying useCached* hooks briefly returned
empty arrays during the re-fetch window. Track the last non-zero count
in refs (updated via effect) and display those during refresh so the
stat value stays stable instead of flashing down.

Fixes #6485

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

       <div

-        "fixed top-16 right-0 bottom-0 w-12 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-l border-border shadow-xl z-40 flex flex-col items-center py-4",
+        "fixed top-16 right-0 bottom-0 w-12 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-l border-border shadow-xl z-modal flex flex-col items-center py-4",
         "transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out",
         !isSidebarOpen && "translate-x-full pointer-events-none"
       )}>
@@ -583,7 +583,7 @@ export function MissionSidebar() {
       <div
         data-tour="ai-missions"
         className={cn(
-          "fixed bg-card border-border z-40 flex flex-col overflow-hidden shadow-2xl",
+          "fixed bg-card border-border z-modal flex flex-col overflow-hidden shadow-2xl",
           !isResizing && "transition-[width,top,border,transform] duration-300 ease-in-out",
           // Mobile: bottom sheet
           isMobile && "inset-x-0 bottom-0 rounded-t-2xl border-t max-h-[80vh]",
